responsibilities: Design and execute reliability test plans, including accelerated life testing, to predict product lifespan and failure modes
Lead FMEA and fault tree analysis sessions with cross-functional teams to identify and mitigate design risks
Analyze field failure and warranty data using Weibull and statistical methods to quantify reliability metrics like MTBF
Conduct root cause investigations on product failures and recommend design or process improvements to enhance reliability
Develop reliability growth models and track reliability KPIs throughout the product development lifecycle
Collaborate with design engineers to implement design-for-reliability principles during new product development
Establish reliability-centered maintenance strategies to optimize equipment uptime and reduce unplanned downtime
Present reliability findings and risk assessments to engineering leadership to support product release decisions
